item.title: Reconstructing a Mixbook Movie with ffmpeg
item.description: How I traced Mixbook's animated Movie feature to its data API, found that the browser builds the video instead of storing it, and rebuilt a downloadable MP4 from the raw photos and music with crossfades, Ken Burns motion, and the original title text

item.title: Adding Localization and RTL Support to a Next.js App
item.description: Notes on adding multiple languages and right-to-left support to a Next.js app, covering logical CSS properties, locale formatting tags, LLM-assisted translation, and two hydration bugs to watch for

item.title: A Sane Schema Workflow for Supabase Projects
item.description: How I keep a Supabase Postgres schema in version control without hand-writing migration files, using pg_dump snapshots, MCP-applied migrations, and a notes file for the things pg_dump can't capture.

item.title: Using Supabase MCP with Multiple Organizations in Claude Code
item.description: How to configure multiple Supabase MCP servers in Claude Code so you can work across different organizations and projects without constantly logging in and out

item.title: How I Boosted My Next.js Landing Page from 76 to 96 on Lighthouse
item.description: A 50KB animation library was blocking my landing page render. Here's how I replaced it with CSS and gained 20 Lighthouse points in the process.

item.title: PDF Text Extraction in Next.js Standalone Builds
item.description: How a simple PDF upload feature turned into a multi-day debugging session across browser polyfills, build tracing, and Docker containers.

item.title: Migrating Static Sites to Dokploy with Traefik and Let's Encrypt
item.description: A practical guide to hosting static sites on Dokploy, including React SPAs, SSL certificates, and the networking gotchas that will save you hours.

item.title: Embedding 500K Medical Texts with PubMedBERT on RunPod
item.description: A practical guide to running large-scale biomedical embeddings on GPU.

item.title: Doximity AI Scribe Experience
item.description: My experience using Doximity's new AI Scribe feature for cardiology documentation including setup and workflow.

item.title: Building a Simple Static Blog with JavaScript and Markdown
item.description: How to create a lightweight, SEO-friendly blog using markdown files, JavaScript, and static HTML templates
